---
title: "mimir.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/wardens/mimir.py"
loc: 87
complexity: 16
logic_score: 1.25
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 2.32
overall_score: 2.07
---

## Intent
Autonomous neural guardian monitoring system drift and anomalies.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate the Warden class and call evaluate(graph) with a compiled matrix graph.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [time](file://time)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [radon.complexity](file://radon.complexity)
- [radon.metrics](file://radon.metrics)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)
- [ast](file://ast)
- [src.core.telemetry](file://src.core.telemetry)

### Exports
- `MimirWarden`
- `scan`
